meta.title: Bacillus aneurinolyticus sp. nov., nom. rev.
meta.section: ORIGINAL PAPERS RELATING TO SYSTEMATIC BACTERIOLOGY

abstractHtml: The taxonomic position of “Bacillus aneurinolyticus” was determined by numerical analyses based on phenotypic characteristics and whole-cell proteins profile, chemosystematic data, DNA base composition, and DNA relatedness. “B. aneurinolyticus” strains were separated into “B. aneurinolyticus” and Bacillus migulanus by DNA relatedness. This result correlated well with the clusters obtained from numerical analyses based on phenotypic characteristics and whole-cell proteins profile. “B. aneurinolyticus” was clearly distinct from other Bacillus species phenotypically and genetically. We propose the revival of the name Bacillus aneurinolyticus.
